text: How is percent used when making comparison statements? How are these the same as or different from other comparison statements?

Students continue building expertise in applying multiple strategies to a variety of percent problems with increasing complexity.

Students appreciate and notice

  • the power of percent ratios when comparing quantities relative to the total;
  • percents let you compare ratios by finding equivalent ratios for quantities out of 100; and
  • percents cannot be used to directly compare two quantities if they are not part of the same whole.
